text: In a surprising announcement yesterday, the city of Brightwater declared that all pigeons within city limits had been officially trained to deliver small packages. City officials claimed the pigeon network reduced traffic congestion by 80%, while residents reported seeing birds wearing tiny GPS backpacks and reflective vests.
